de.uka.ilkd.key.proof.init.ContractPO

  • Packages that use ContractPO 
    Package Description
    de.uka.ilkd.key.informationflow.po  
    de.uka.ilkd.key.proof.init
    This package contains classes handling prover initialisation.
    de.uka.ilkd.key.proof.mgt
    This package contains classes for proof environments and proof management.
    de.uka.ilkd.key.speclang
    This package contains the specification language frontends of KeY.

    • Uses of ContractPO in de.uka.ilkd.key.proof.mgt

      Methods in de.uka.ilkd.key.proof.mgt that return ContractPO 
      Modifier and Type Method and Description
      ContractPO SpecificationRepository.getContractPOForProof(Proof proof)
      Returns the PO that the passed proof is about, or null.
      ContractPO SpecificationRepository.getPO(Contract c)
      Returns the PO that the passed contract is about, or null.
      ContractPO SpecificationRepository.getPOForProof(Proof proof)
